_comment: C10 Phase 2A — Plain-Paper From-To Memorandum (with enclosures)
body: 1. This memorandum distributes the annual training schedule for FY2026. All departments must review the enclosed schedule and submit any conflicts by 30 May 2026.
2. Department heads are responsible for ensuring all personnel complete required training within the specified timeframe.
3. Questions regarding training requirements should be directed to the Training Officer.
